title: cleome jamesii
intro: Cleome jamesii, also known as the Rocky Mountain beeplant, is a flowering plant native to the western United States. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate rheumatic pains. The plant's roots and leaves have been used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to promote overall health and well-being. The health benefits of Cleome jamesii include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and support the immune system.
